name: HWR_TEAM_OSN_JOBS
description: The HWR Team osn jobs run details are stored in this table

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the identifier associated to the row

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: job name

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: error message

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: stores the status of the job

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE
columns.Comments: job type

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: stores the external id that is sent to osn

columns.Name: LAST_RUN_DATE
columns.Comments: last run date

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_INTERVAL
columns.Comments: schedule interval

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RESULT
columns.Comments: stores result of the job

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR1
columns.Comments: additional column to store varchar datatype

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR2
columns.Comments: additional column to store varchar datatype

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR3
columns.Comments: additional column to store timestamp datatype

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR4
columns.Comments: additional column to store timestamp datatype

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR5
columns.Comments: additional column to store number datatype

columns.Name: OSN_ATTR6
columns.Comments: additional column to store number datatype
